title: Johnny Bravo in The Hukka-Mega-Mighty-Ultra-Extreme Date-O-Rama!
short_description: Help Johnny Bravo win a dream date in this side-splitting action game based on the Cartoon Network series.
description: Wannabe stud Johnny Bravo is thrilled when he's invited to appear on the game show Hukka Mega Mighty Ultra Extreme Date-o-Rama to try to win a dream date with a hot chick, but even with his self-professed stunning good looks, incredible strength, and superior intelligence he has his work cut out to win the competition. Can you beat your rival studs and get the girl in this side-splitting action game based on the hit Cartoon Network series?
